ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CopilotKit/CopilotKit
Language: typescript
The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React, Angular, Mobile, Slack, and more. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
Language: typescript
Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF

Language: typescript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager
Language: typescript
"Sigma File Manager" is a free, open-source, quickly evolving, modern file manager (explorer / browser) app for Windows and Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babel/babel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babel/babel
Language: typescript
🐠 Babel is a compiler for writing next generation JavaScript.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bluewave-labs/Checkmate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bluewave-labs/Checkmate
Language: typescript
Checkmate is an open-source, self-hosted tool designed to track and monitor server hardware, uptime, response times, and incidents in real-time with beautiful visualizations. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.com/invite/NAb6H3UTjK :)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cypress-io/cypress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cypress-io/cypress
Language: typescript
Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fluxerapp/fluxer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluxerapp/fluxer
Language: typescript
A free and open source instant messaging and VoIP platform built for friends, groups, and communities. Self-hosting and more activity in this repository is coming very soon! See the README.

URL: https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
Language: typescript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/grafana
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/grafana
Language: typescript
The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.
